title: What da Hell is up with Unit 01s Horn thing
display_title: What da Hell is up with Unit 01s Horn thing
wikitext:
[]: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by digital88 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 8:14 am It just came to me recently while watching the Platinum edition. (Sorri guys dis is my first post so try to go easy on me ) Well..as everyone knoes, Unit 01 has a Horn pointing on top of its head..now the question is, was it designed for a purpose or juz for the sake of making Unit 01 cooler looking?

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Oct 29, 2007 9:09 am This is a question I've been meaning to ask. The actual Evangelion underneath all the armor doesn't have a horn, and it doesn't seem to have any practical use - so why's it there?

[]:             Quote Post by Shiro » Mon Oct 29, 2007 9:46 am According to Matt Greenfield, it represents a penis. Really though, I bet it's just aesthetic.

[]:             Quote Post by digital88 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:18 am Well..true about its true natural form being completely horn free..but i doubt its a penis..maybe its useful for combat?

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:29 am Shiro wrote: According to Matt Greenfield, it represents a penis.

[]:             Quote Post by digital88 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:38 am Agreed abt that part..but still makes u wonder kinda how its useful or unuseful in combat situations..haha

[]:             Quote Post by EvaCub » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:40 am I think Its cool but I dont know about combat maybe she could ram it into an angel

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Mon Oct 29, 2007 11:42 am CitizenGeek wrote: Shiro wrote: According to Matt Greenfield, it represents a penis.

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:15 pm digital88 wrote: ..as everyone knoes, Unit 01 has a Horn pointing on top of its head..now the question is, was it designed for a purpose or juz for the sake of making Unit 01 cooler looking?

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:21 pm TriLink12 wrote: Which leaves me to ponder; What the hell are those things? Unlike the horn, which seems to at least serve some purpose, these thingamabobers seem to be completely useless.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:23 pm So far they've been used to hold knives, and a spike launcher (which seems a bit gimmicky). They also break off when Eva 01's wings form. Could be a restraint, probably just their too look sweet.

[]:             Quote Post by Themaninblack » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:26 pm Shiro wrote: According to Matt Greenfield, it represents a penis. Really though, I bet it's just aesthetic.

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:28 pm TriLink12 wrote: Which leaves me to ponder; What the hell are those things? Unlike the horn, which seems to at least serve some purpose, these thingamabobers seem to be completely useless.

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:31 pm fadingreminder wrote: TriLink12 wrote: Which leaves me to ponder; What the hell are those things? Unlike the horn, which seems to at least serve some purpose, these thingamabobers seem to be completely useless.

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:34 pm TriLink12 wrote: fadingreminder wrote: TriLink12 wrote: Which leaves me to ponder; What the hell are those things? Unlike the horn, which seems to at least serve some purpose, these thingamabobers seem to be completely useless.

[]: Re: What da Hell is up with Unit-01's Horn thing?             Quote Post by TriLink » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:38 pm SEELE 08 wrote: Speaking of where eva's store their onboard weapons...where do the harpies store their Lances at? Are they dropped seperatly or squirreled away magically like their wings?

[]:             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:38 pm CitizenGeek wrote: The actual Evangelion underneath all the armor doesn't have a horn, and it doesn't seem to have any practical use - so why's it there?

[]:             Quote Post by fadingreminder » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:47 pm Honestly, I always thought the horn was there like a representation of an oni or demon. That's just my two cents anyway.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 2:50 pm I've heard that it was a casing for an antenna. Which seems rather silly to me, but it's the first explanation i can remember hearing.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Oct 29, 2007 3:00 pm who is it around this forum that has a sig containing a post someone commenting about Yui-sama's horn?
